title: Senator Deb Fischer Introduces Joint Resolution to Repeal Californiaâ€™s Heavy-Duty EV Mandate and Emission Standards
content: Sen. Fischer, Deb [R-NE] has introduced a Joint Resolution for congressional disapproval under chapter 8 of title 5, United States Code, of the rule submitted by the Environmental Protection Agency relating to "California State Motor Vehicle and Engine Pollution Control Standards; Heavy-Duty Vehicle and Engine Emission Warranty and Maintenance Provisions; Advanced Clean Trucks; Zero Emission Airport Shuttle; Zero-Emission Power Train Certification; Waiver of Preemption; Notice of Decision".
author: Aru Somya
